subcodes.first_line: Thou knowest, O my God, that my sole aim on this earth hath been to rehabilitate the world and edify the souls of its peoples
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعلم یا الهی بانی ما اردت فی الملک الا اصلاح العالم و تهذیب نفوس الامم لعل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @unity; oneness of humanity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
